message:
✨ New version 3.5

• Each container now has a search box: type an AUnload, SKU, location or name to filter instantly.
• Tap the three dots (⋮) to show duplicate locations, SKUs in other unloads, and receiving (who did the receiving and who did the put away of each pallet).
• The manager can now see connected devices, rename them, send announcements and, if needed, block them or request an update.
• Stability and live sync improvements.

Download and install now?
